inbound.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-preflight-enabled", "false") == "true")">
                
                    @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-preflight-url"))
                    POST
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    
                        @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-tenant-id"))
                    
                    
                        @($"Bearer {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-api-key")}")
                    
                    @{
                        var customerId = context.Subscription?.Key ?? context.User?.Id ?? "";
                        var body = new JObject();
                        body["customerId"] = customerId;
                        return body.ToString(Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.None);
                    }
                

                
                
                    
                        <set-variable name="preflightDecision" value="@{
                            try {
                                var response = ((IResponse)context.Variables["preflightResponse"]);
                                if (response.StatusCode != 200) return "ALLOW";
                                var body = response.Body.As();
                                var data = body["data"] ?? body;
                                return data["decision"]?.ToString() ?? "ALLOW";
                            } catch {
                                return context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-preflight-fallback", "ALLOW");
                            }
                        }" />

                        
                            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("preflightDecision") == "DENY")">
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        application/json
                                    
                                    
                                        60
                                    
                                    {"message": "Rate limit exceeded"}
                                
                            
                            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("preflightDecision") == "WARN")">
                                
                                    approaching-limit
